headline: Will USDA's Farm Income Decline Reflect on Deere's Margin in FY26?
summary: DE faces farm income headwinds, but rising construction demand and higher FY26 guidance signal potential resilience despite ongoing ag sector weakness.

headline: John Deere and Tarter USA Announce Strategic Partnership to Launch American-Made Flex Wing Rotary Cutters
summary: John Deere and Tarter USA announced a strategic manufacturing partnership to develop and produce a new line of American-made Flex Wing Rotary Cutters under the Frontier™ brand. This collaboration brings together two industry leaders with a shared commitment to innovation, product excellence, and strengthening U.S. manufacturing.

headline: Revisiting Former Stock Picks Sterling Infrastructure, Corpay, Deere
summary: Revisiting former stock picks is essential because it provides a real-world measure of what’s working and what isn’t, helping to refine both strategy and discipline.  The next session jumped 12% completing a bullish island reversal on a well received earnings reaction.
